differential_diagnoses: PASH syndrome (pyoderma gangrenosum, acne, and hidradenitis suppurativa)
next_steps: Perform punch biopsy of the advancing edge of an ulcer for histopathology and tissue culture
Assess for underlying inflammatory bowel disease via colonoscopy or fecal calprotectin testing
Continue supportive care and monitor for signs of superinfection of the ulcerated lesions
Consider additional immunosuppressive agents if response to glucocorticoids is insufficient
